THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFFS' ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULTS. (CCP SECTION 473.) FEES AND COSTS WILL BE THE SUBJECT OF A SEPARATELY FILED MOTION IF THE PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO THE AMOUNT. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Michael Carroll, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Kehoe and Lorena Kehoe.
Plaintiff Witness Robert Kehoe, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: Raymond Xiankai Zhang and United Cabinet Outlet, Inc. as follows:
Principal $15,519.30
Consequential Damages $67,791.00
Prejudgment Interest $3,685.60
Attorney's Fees $8,000.00
Costs $335.00, for a total of $95,330.90
Judgment signed in open court.
